response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js, aligning well with the primary stack. His roles include architecting scalable solutions, optimizing performance, and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure, which are highly relevant. While his experience with Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, his broad testing expertise (Jest, Selenium, TDD) suggests strong adaptability.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React and Nest.js
Proven ability to scale systems (millions of requests, real-time processing)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Vitest experience (testing framework requirement)
Limited documentation of direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary stack)
Primary focus on backend and AI-agent work may limit frontend depth in recent roles
